nasb.text: Who knows that the breath of man ascends upward and the breath of the beast descends downward to the earth?

esv.text: Who knows whether the spirit of man goes upward and the spirit of the beast goes down into the earth?

cnv.text: 有誰知道人的靈是往上升，牲畜的魂是下降而入地呢？”

ccb.text: 谁知道人的气息会向上升，兽的气息会降到地下呢？”

csbs.text: 谁知道人的灵是否往上升，兽的灵是否往下降入地里呢？
